# KinMate

> KinMate is a local-first, privacy-first family health record app for iOS and Android. It keeps medical reports, medications, reminders and health metrics for you, your family members and pets; explains lab/medical reports with bilingual (English / 简体中文) AI; and backs up to your own cloud (iCloud, Google Drive or OneDrive). Your data stays on your device and in your own cloud — KinMate does not sell data and uses no third-party analytics or crash SDKs.

## What KinMate does
- **Family health records**: one private vault for medical reports, prescriptions, documents and health metrics across yourself, managed profiles (elderly parents, children, dependents) and pets.
- **AI lab-report explanation**: upload a lab report or prescription (image or PDF) and get a plain-language, bilingual explanation of metrics and abnormalities. Educational only — not a medical diagnosis.
- **Medications & reminders**: medication tracking, pill/dose reminders, vaccination records, appointment and safety check-in reminders.
- **Family & caregiving**: share profiles within a family, invite caregivers, run "safety check-ins" for elderly relatives, manage a shared family pool with elastic seats.
- **Pets**: pet health profiles, vaccination records, feeding/medication reminders; share a personal pet into the family pool.
- **Bring-your-own-cloud (BYOC)**: encrypted backup to iCloud Drive, Google Drive or OneDrive — you choose and can switch providers.
- **Local-first & offline**: works offline; syncs when back online.

## Pricing
- **Free**: 1 pet, basic records and reminders.
- **Personal Plus / Family 3 / Family 5**: monthly or yearly subscriptions adding managed profiles, family seats, higher AI quota and pet slots.
- **Family 8 (Lifetime)**: one-time purchase, US$199.99, never expires.
- **60-day free trial** for new users.

## Privacy
- Local-first; data lives on-device and in the user's own cloud account.
- No data selling. No third-party analytics or crash SDKs (no RevenueCat, no Sentry).
- In-app account deletion removes the account and associated cloud data.
- AI explanations are for understanding/education only and are not medical advice or diagnosis.

## Platforms
- iOS (iPhone / iPad) and Android. Sign in with email or Google.

KinMate is built by AppLabs.
